'''âdh-p-j-g''' ('''kadhapjegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monogrammatise|monogrammatise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-p-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monogrammatise|monogrammatise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-p-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadhapjegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhapjegoko|thidhapjegoko]] || [[word:jidhapjegoko|jidhapjegoko]] || [[word:shidhapjegoko|shidhapjegoko]] || [[word:kidhapjegoko|kidhapjegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhapjegoko|thuthudhapjegoko]] || [[word:jujudhapjegoko|jujudhapjegoko]] || [[word:shushudhapjegoko|shushudhapjegoko]] || [[word:kukudhapjegoko|kukudhapjegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhapjegoko|thudhapjegoko]] || [[word:judhapjegoko|judhapjegoko]] || [[word:shudhapjegoko|shudhapjegoko]] || [[word:kudhapjegoko|kudhapjegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhapjegoko|thodhapjegoko]] || [[word:jodhapjegoko|jodhapjegoko]] || [[word:shodhapjegoko|shodhapjegoko]] || [[word:kodhapjegoko|kodhapjegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhapjegoko|thĂŠdhapjegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhapjegoko|jĂŠdhapjegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhapjegoko|shĂŠdhapjegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhapjegoko|kĂŠdhapjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhapjegoko|thathadhapjegoko]] || [[word:jajadhapjegoko|jajadhapjegoko]] || [[word:shashadhapjegoko|shashadhapjegoko]] || [[word:kakadhapjegoko|kakadhapjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhapjegoko|thadhapjegoko]] || [[word:jadhapjegoko|jadhapjegoko]] || [[word:shadhapjegoko|shadhapjegoko]] || [[word:kadhapjegoko|kadhapjegoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
